name: symptom-multi-select
title: Symptom Multi-Select
description: Searchable multi-select of symptoms as removable chips with per-symptom severity and duration.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Selected symptoms: { id, label, severity?, duration?, custom? }.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on add/remove or per-symptom edit.

clinicalNotes: Keep an "other" path — a fixed symptom list that forces the patient to mis-map their complaint loses signal, so free-text symptoms are added as custom entries and marked as such. Onset/duration and severity per symptom matter for triage and are offered, not required. Selection is structured data, not free text: each chip carries an id the caller can reconcile against a coding system.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes popover + input + checkbox + badge + toggle-group + button. Each chip opens a popover to set severity/duration.
